name: Medica Group Plc
summary: Medica Group Plc provides teleradiology reporting services to NHS trusts, private hospital groups, and diagnostic imaging companies in the United Kingdom. It offers NightHawk emergency computerised tomography (CT) and MR reporting, routine cross sectional, routine plain film, and radiographer plain film services. The company also provides audit services, such as cause for concern audit, departmental quality assurance, and ongoing CT, MR, plain film, and ultrasound audit services; and multiparametric prostate magnetic resonance imaging, specialist cardiac reporting, CT colonoscopy, DXA reporting, nuclear medicine examination, tailored cancer reporting, PET-CT, and CBCT services. Medica Group Plc was incorporated in 2013 and is based in Hastings, the United Kingdom.
